data.description:
## Why
Humans and a future CI gate need to see/consume all attestations on a ticket.
## What
Render the `attestations` map in `show` and the MCP ticket state (omitted when empty).
Document the new model in `docs/plan-review-gate.md` and a new attestations doc section:
when each kind is emitted, additive-across/replace-within semantics, immutable-record +
validity-on-read, and how a future CI gate would consume `verify-signature --kind K`.
Explicitly document the HMAC symmetric-key constraint (a CI verifier needs
`REBAR_SIGNING_KEY`) as known follow-up; do not build a CI `gate-check` command here.
## Scope
`src/rebar/_engine_support/reads_cli.py` / show path, `src/rebar/mcp_server.py`, `docs/`.
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `show`/MCP render `attestations` (kind -> record); omitted when empty.
- [ ] `docs/plan-review-gate.md` + attestations section document emission, semantics, validity-on-read.
- [ ] CI-readiness documented (per-kind certified check) plus the HMAC symmetric-key constraint as follow-up.
- [ ] No CI `gate-check` command is added in this epic (scope note recorded).
data.title: show/MCP rendering + docs (CI-readiness, HMAC-key note)
